title: Tiramisu Sword Expansion
description: Funny Minecraft Mod that adds New Sword
body:
# Tiramisu Sword Expansion

**Tiramisu Sword Expansion** is a small mod that adds **a variety of new swords** to the game, each with unique abilities and effects.

---

## 🗡 Features

This mod introduces **18 new swords**, each with its own mechanics and style.

### Unlucky Sword
- If you have **less than 5 hearts** and are **level 30 or higher**, it grants **Instant Health** and **Resistance**.

### Tiramit Sword
- A simple **Fire Aspect sword** — nothing special, but reliable.

### Old Sword  
- A **classic 1.8-style sword**, for those who miss the old combat system.

### Ender Sword  
- Allows you to **teleport** by right-clicking.  
- When at **level 30 or higher**, you can **teleport between dimensions** to the same coordinates.

### Poison Sword  
- Inflicts **Poison** for **2000 ticks** on hit.

### Dead Sword  
- When you have **less than 5 hearts**, right-clicking grants **helpful effects** to keep you alive.

### Crystal Swords  
- Feature **low durability** but **very high attack damage**.

### Frog Sword  
- Just a **fun and silly sword**.

### Katana  
- A **fast and powerful** version of the **iron sword**.

### Void Sword  
- The **strongest sword** in the mod.  
- If you’re **level 50**, you can activate **invincibility mode**.

### Life Sword  
- Applies the **Wither effect** to enemies.

### Glowing Sword  
- Gives the **Glowing effect**, and nothing else.

### XP Sword  
- When you’re **level 100**, it deals **100 damage per hit**.

### Star Sword  
- Below **level 5**, it’s just a normal sword.  
- Above **level 5**, it **summons a laser from the sky**.  
- At **level 30**, when crouching, it **fires a mega laser** from the sky.

---

## 🎮 Who Is This Mod For?

This mod is designed for **players who want more sword variety** and enjoy experimenting with special weapon abilities.

---

## 🔧 Created With

**Made using [MCreator](https://mcreator.net)**.
